name: Electric Dreams
short_description: What androids dream of! (A collection of various tech demos, unfinished projects, and minigames)
detailed_description:
A collection of half-finished projects, minigames, and tech demos that aren't complete or interesting enough to justify releasing on their own, but may be interesting in aggregate.

Current Dreams include:
The MicroDream Arcade - A collection of minigames (currently 11), some common, some uncommon. Try Bartending, Block Breaking, Fruit Catching, Lights Out-ing, Mail Sorting, Minesweepering, Number Combo-ing, Pattern Taps-ing, Picross-ing, Stack 'Em-ing, and Word Guessing!

SimplyTrivia - A simple multiplayer trivia game with a lobby system that may be familiar to those who enjoy packs of party games. Trivia is drawn from OpenTDB.



***REQUIRES .NET Core 6.0***
I tried to set it up to install with the game but I have no idea if it worked, if it didn't and you didn't already have .NET Core from another game then you can just grab the latest version from Microsoft. Sorry for the inconvenience!
